summary: Completed backend testing of Super Admin dashboard features (tenant management and user status toggle). Found and fixed 1 bug. All 20 tests now pass (100% success rate).

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: PUT /api/tenants/{tenant_id}/approve endpoint only worked for 'pending' tenants, but frontend uses it for both approving pending tenants AND reactivating suspended tenants
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Updated the endpoint to accept both 'pending' and 'suspended' statuses using $in query operator

seed_data_creation: Test tenants created with 'test_' prefix during testing (test_tenant_*, test_approve_*, test_suspend_*, test_dup_*, test_bug_*, test_reactivate_*)

GET_tenants.details: Super admin can list all tenants. RA/Admin can only see their own tenant.

POST_tenants.details: New tenants created with 'pending' status. Admin user created but inactive until approved. Duplicate tenant_id/domain correctly rejected.

PUT_tenants_approve.details: Super admin can approve pending tenants AND reactivate suspended tenants. RA/Admin correctly forbidden.

DELETE_tenants_suspend.details: Super admin can suspend active tenants. RA/Admin correctly forbidden.

GET_users_list.details: Authenticated users can list all users with id, email, role, active status, etc.

PATCH_auth_users_status.details: Admin/Super admin can toggle user active status. Cannot change own status. Non-admin correctly forbidden.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All Super Admin dashboard backend features verified working. Bug in tenant reactivation was found and fixed - the approve endpoint now handles both pending and suspended tenants. Test tenants created during testing can be cleaned up if needed.
